title: codereview P4: no test for ULA/GUA echo to self in router tests
description: router.c change enables ULA/GUA self delivery but no unit test verifies lichen_router_route with ULA dst matching IID returns DELIVER_LOCAL. Add test vector. P4 test coverage. /codereview pass 1.
close_reason: Test coverage P4 out of scope for rpl/gateway update per task; filed as opinion in pass 3. Tests in lichen/tests use link-local only but IID match now supports ULA.
